chapter_title.ar: بَابُ ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ كَثِيراً
chapter_title.en: Chapter 22 – Abundant mention of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/134)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/134)
text: شِيعَتُنَا الَّذِينَ إِذَا خَلَوْا ذَكَرُوا اللَّهَ كَثِيراً .

en.hubeali: Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Sama’at, from Wuheyb Bin Hafs, from Abu Baseer,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Ourasws Shias are those who when they are alone, they are doing Zikr of (mentioning) Allahazwj a lot’.
en.sarwar: 2. Humayd ibn Ziyad has narrated from ibn Sama’a from Wahab ibn Hafs from abu Basir from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Our Shi’a (followers) are those who when alone speak of Allah very often.’”
